## Problem

What user or operator problem should this solve?

## Proposed behavior

What should OpenSend do?

## Self-hosting impact

Does this require new env vars, services, queues, storage, DNS records, provider permissions, or migrations?

## API or dashboard impact

Does this affect public API routes, SDKs, docs, OpenAPI, dashboard flows, or webhooks?

## Alternatives considered

What workaround are you using today?
